calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-04-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WED, JUN-04-08: LIEN LAC, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF; FULL SCOPE ATTORNEY AARON MORRISON, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT HONGWEN WU, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; THE CASE SETTLES; TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT ARE PLACED ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT WU IS TO VACATE PREMISE LOCATED AT 5600 FULTON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94121 BY JULY 21, 2008; PLAINTIFF WILL WAIVE ANY BACK RENT AND ALL RENT DUE THROUGH JUL-31-2008; SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE HANDLED AS PER SECT. 1950.5 & AS PER S.F.
RESIDENTIAL STABILIZATION & ARBITRATION ORDINANCE; PLAINTIFF AGREES TO DISMISS WITHIN SEVEN DAYS AND WAIVES ALL FUTURE CLAIMS OF TENANCY AT THE SUBJECT PREMISE.
ON THE RECORD DEFENDANT WU AGREES TO THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND WAIVES ALL ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS; EACH PARTY TO PAY OWN ATTORNEY FEES & COSTS. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT INFORM THE COURT THEY UNDERSTAND AND AGREE TO ALL TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT REACHED THIS DATE.
COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT ADDITIONAL DOCUMENT(S).

3:47PM: MATTER ADJOURNED.

JPT MIKE LEE; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; REPORTER: TAMARA WILLAT-HARRISON, CSR #4609 (218).
